steps.title: Identify the roots
steps.content: $f(x) = (x+7)^2 + 4$ is in vertex form $a(x-h)^2 + k$ with $a = 1$, $h = -7$, $k = 4$.

steps.title: Apply the new function definition
steps.content: Since $a > 0$, the parabola opens upward and has its minimum at the vertex $x = h$.

steps.title: Compute the answer
steps.content: The minimum occurs at $x = -7$. The answer is -7.
